title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・二強

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're charging up the second slope and around
the third corner! It's rough going, but here's where
the race really starts!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff... Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Come on, Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Goooo, Kitasaaan!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will prove themself stronger between
Kitasan Black and Satono Diamond?! The winner
is... Kitasan Black! Kitasan Black secures another
victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow... What a mind-blowing race... For Kitasan
and Satono both.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, I've got goosebumps! It literally gave me
chills!

text_block_list.name: Man in Hoodie
text_block_list.text: Oooh, they both ran so well! What a race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha!
Those two really brought it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You thinking what I'm thinking, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Indeed I am. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... My legs... They're shaking...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Puff, puff... Hehe, mine too! I'm so tired I can barely stand!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: It's so frustrating... I gave it everything I had...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I worked so hard to surpass my limits.
But I still couldn't win...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You beat me fair and square... Congratulations on
your consecutive wins, Kita.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, but still... I was able to go beyond my limits
because I had you pushing me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If I keep running with you, I'm sure I'll become an
even greater runner!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I feel exactly the same way! Let's make our way to
the top together!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! To the top, huh?! You say that like it's
nothing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Do you realize who's waiting for you at the top?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: T-Teio?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I reign here at the top! If you want up here, you're
gonna have to go through me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, Teio. Don't play it up too much.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Uh... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Consider this an official challenge from the both
of us! McQueen and I will be running in the fall!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You wanna get to the top, right? Then, give us
your best shot!

text_block_list.name: Dia & Kitasan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
A-are you really going to run?! I-I hadn't heard
anything about that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's correct. We weren't originally planning on
running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, we have both changed our minds after
observing your race today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We want to race against the two of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The way you ran today lit a fire in our hearts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What do you say? Do you accept our challenge?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I would be honored to race with both
of you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Me too! I gladly accept!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's what I like to hear!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll be running in the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And I will be running in the autumn Tenno Sho. I
expect to see you both there.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is gonna be great! It's been too long since I
ran in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now, if you'll excuse us.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Am I dreaming, Dia? Pinch me!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're not dreaming! That is, unless we're both
having the same dream...
choice_data_list: I heard it too. You're not dreaming.
I heard it too. You're not dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Omigooosh! This is really happening! We get to
run against Teio!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And McQueen too! In the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy... To think this day would come...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond trembles with passion and her
eyes well up with tears. Kitasan Black reacts much
the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hardly surprising. They both entered Tracen
Academy because they looked up to Mejiro
McQueen and Tokai Teio.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna run in both the autumn Tenno Sho and
the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I was planning on doing the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown tour anyway. What about you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to run in the autumn Tenno Sho! I'd like to
run against McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That means she'd be running after summer camp.
That might make training difficult, considering
she doesn't do well in the heat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little worried about making the autumn
Tenno Sho her first race after summer. It might be
wise to run another race first to see how well she's
holding up.
choice_data_list: Let's do the Kyoto Daishoten first.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I have no objections. We can refine my training
based on my performance there.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If the fans choose me for the Takarazuka Kinen,
I'll run there first, and then the autumn Tenno Sho
after!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's both do our best to beat McQueen in the
autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow... I still feel like I'm dreaming...
choice_data_list: Reality will sink in soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, but I can't just sit on cloud nine. This is my
chance to compete against McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Both McQueen and Teio are already doing great
work as illustrious racers.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to learn from them and figure out what
being illustrious truly means for me.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Especially McQueen. She bears the weight of the
Mejiro name, so her circumstances are quite
similar to mine.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
As a representative of the Satono family, I must
consider what kind of illustrious runner I wish to
be.
choice_data_list: I'm always here if you want to talk about it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promised to realize her dream of becoming an
illustrious runner capable of winning G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer, there's only so much I can do about
her future, but I want to help her as much as I can.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm counting on you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Once I beat McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"The Satono family's dream will finally come true."
I finish the sentence for her in my mind, feeling
the weight and significance behind each word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can beat someone as distinguished as
Mejiro McQueen, then she can definitely call
herself an illustrious Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But before that, we have the Kyoto Daishoten.
We can't afford any setbacks in this warm-up
race.
